## Verification before start

- [ ] Product hypothesis, population, measures, thresholds, and non-goals are fixed before viewing results.
- [ ] Required authorization, consent, privacy, accessibility, and security reviews are recorded.
- [ ] Instrumentation/event semantics and baseline queries are verified.
- [ ] Success, guardrail, data-quality, and stop signals have named owners.
- [ ] Rollout, recovery, and support/incident paths are rehearsed where consequences justify it.
